title: Cab Booking System
description: Engineered a scalable cab booking platform with real-time booking, dashboards, and an admin panel. Integrated Google Maps API for live tracking and Razorpay for secure payments.

title: Spreadsheet Web Application
description: Engineered an Excel-like web app with advanced filtering, sorting, and formula computations; optimized for high performance and deployed seamlessly on Vercel.

title: Add to Cart Web Application
description: Developed a responsive e-commerce application with optimized cart state management and a clean user interface; features live deployment on Vercel.

title: Supply Chain Management System
description: Designed and implemented supplier, inventory, and order modules, boosting operational efficiency by 30%. Features a fully responsive front-end.

title: Tic-Tac-Toe Game
description: A classic interactive Tic-Tac-Toe game with a modern UI, featuring real-time score tracking and responsive design. Built with clean, modular JavaScript logic.

title: Music Player
description: A sleek digital music player featuring play/pause controls, song progress bar, and an elegant glassmorphism-inspired UI for an immersive listening experience.
